title: Direct object access by ID without ownership check
description: Resource fetched by ID parameter without subsequent ownership verification.
remediation: Add WHERE userId = req.user.id to query or check ownership after fetch

title: Prisma findUnique without user filter
description: Prisma query fetches record by ID alone without user ownership filter.
remediation: Add userId to the where clause: { id: req.params.id, userId: req.user.id }

title: Sequential numeric IDs in routes
description: Route uses sequential numeric IDs which are easily enumerable.
remediation: Use UUIDs instead of sequential IDs, or ensure authorization on every request

title: List endpoint without user filtering
description: List endpoint returns all records without filtering by authenticated user.
remediation: Filter list results by authenticated user: where: { userId: req.user.id }
